subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy countenance towards Him Who hath fashioned the heavens and the earth! Thou hast indeed perused the eloquent and radiant epistle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من وجه وجهه للذی فطر السموات و الارض قد تلوت الصحیفه البلیغه الرائقه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @love of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
